name: Homemade Mounds Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sweetened condensed milk and vanilla until smooth.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing continuously until the mixture is firm.
3. Stir in the flaked coconut.
4. Press the mixture firmly into a 9x13-inch pan.
5. Refrigerate until the mixture is completely set.
6. Cut into bars.
7. Dip each bar into melted chocolate.
8. Place on waxed paper to cool for several hours before serving.
